segment: B2B Workflow Automation & Enterprise Process Management

trends.title: AI-Native Automation
trends.description: 67% of enterprise buyers now require AI/ML capabilities as baseline in workflow automation RFPs. Agentic AI (autonomous multi-step task completion) is the fastest-growing sub-segment at 34% YoY.

trends.title: Compliance-as-a-Feature
trends.description: EU AI Act, DORA, and updated SOC 2 requirements are driving procurement cycles. Vendors with built-in compliance reporting see 2.3x faster sales cycles in regulated industries.

trends.title: Platform Consolidation
trends.description: Enterprises are reducing point solution count by 30% on average. Buyers prefer fewer, deeper integrations over many shallow ones. Bundled platforms gaining share over best-of-breed.

trends.title: SMB Market Expansion
trends.description: Mid-market ($50M-$500M revenue) is the fastest-growing buyer segment, currently underserved by enterprise-priced tools. 3x more deals available vs. enterprise segment by volume.

trends.title: Real-Time Data Fabric
trends.description: Event-driven architectures and real-time operational analytics are becoming table stakes. Batch-only reporting platforms losing deals to real-time alternatives.

opportunities.title: AI decision-assist layer for workflow automation
opportunities.description: No competitor offers native AI reasoning over workflow context with explainable outputs. First-mover advantage window estimated 12-18 months.

opportunities.title: Compliance automation bundle for regulated industries
opportunities.description: Financial services and healthcare segments are willing to pay 40% premium for built-in compliance reporting. Current gap in market for sub-$50k/year solutions.

opportunities.title: Embedded analytics for non-technical operators
opportunities.description: Operations teams want contextual analytics within workflow tools, not separate BI dashboards. Reduce churn risk for existing Analytics Hub customers.
